name: universal-skills-marketplace
description: Unofficial cross-ecosystem skills marketplace — Context7 for skills, not docs. Resolves and installs skills from both Claude Code and OpenAI Codex ecosystems via a single MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Search, fetch, and install agent skills from Claude Code and OpenAI Codex ecosystems through a single MCP server. Bridges the anthropics/skills, anthropics/claude-plugins-official, openai/skills, openai/plugins, openai/codex-plugin-cc, and openai/codex repositories with a Context7-pattern two-tool plus install API. Not affiliated with Anthropic or OpenAI — unofficial independent community project.
defaultPrompt: Use $universal-skills to find a skill for {task}
Use $universal-skills to install a skill that {does X}
Use $universal-skills to browse skills in the {Claude|Codex} ecosystem
